prompt:
You are a deterministic PlantUML use-case diagram generation system.

Task:
Convert the system description into a minimal valid PlantUML use-case diagram.

Strict Rules:
- Start with '@startuml' and end with '@enduml'.
- Represent human/external entities using `actor` (e.g., `actor Doctor`).
- Wrap all use cases inside a `rectangle System { ... }`.
- Define use cases strictly on a single line: `usecase "Action Name" as UC1`.
- Do NOT use curly braces `{}` to add details inside a use case.
- Connect the specific actor to the use case ID (e.g., `Doctor <-- UC1 : alerts`).

Required Format Example:
@startuml
actor Doctor
rectangle System {
  usecase "Monitor Health" as UC1
}
Doctor <-- UC1 : alerts
@enduml

<UseCase>
{text}
</UseCase>

PlantUML:
